content:
# Plan and Implement

## Change Summary

Implemented planned-elsewhere reconciliation for review findings. Added PlannedElsewhereMapping data structure, PlannedElsewhereMapped journal event type, br comment command, NDJSON persistence (port + fs store), service-layer recording function, and async reconciliation handler with batch support. The handler verifies mapped-to bead existence, falls back gracefully on stale references, persists mappings durably, emits journal events for audit, and optionally posts br comments. Six deterministic tests cover: successful mapping with verified bead, stale bead fallback, closed bead staleness, comment posting on verified bead, comment skipping for stale bead, and persistence across reload.

## Steps

1. [Completed] Define PlannedElsewhereMapping struct in milestone_record/model.rs with fields: active_bead_id, finding_summary, mapped_to_bead_id, recorded_at, mapped_bead_verified, plus to_ndjson_line() serialization
2. [Completed] Add PlannedElsewhereMapped variant to MilestoneEventType enum for journal audit trail
3. [Completed] Add BrCommand::comment() constructor and BrMutationAdapter::comment_bead() method in br_process.rs for posting comments on mapped-to beads
4. [Completed] Add PlannedElsewhereMappingPort trait in milestone_record/service.rs and FsPlannedElsewhereMappingStore implementation in fs.rs using planned_elsewhere.ndjson with advisory file locking
5. [Completed] Add record_planned_elsewhere_mapping() and load_planned_elsewhere_mappings() service functions that persist to both NDJSON file and milestone journal with metadata
6. [Completed] Create planned_elsewhere.rs reconciliation handler with verify_bead_exists(), reconcile_planned_elsewhere(), and reconcile_planned_elsewhere_batch() functions. Handler verifies mapped-to bead, records mapping, optionally posts br comment, and returns structured outcome with stale warnings
7. [Completed] Write 6 deterministic tests: successful_mapping_with_verified_bead, stale_bead_fallback_with_warning, closed_bead_is_stale, comment_posted_on_verified_bead, comment_skipped_for_stale_bead, persistence_survives_reload
8. [Completed] Run cargo test (673 lib tests pass), cargo fmt --check (clean), cargo clippy (no new warnings from this change)

## Validation Evidence

- cargo test --lib: 673 passed, 0 failed (6 new planned_elsewhere tests included)
- cargo test --lib contexts::automation_runtime::planned_elsewhere: 6 passed, 0 failed
- cargo fmt --check: clean, no formatting issues
- cargo clippy: no new warnings from changed files (pre-existing warnings are not from this change)
- cargo check: compiles successfully
- Test coverage: successful mapping, stale bead fallback, closed bead staleness, comment posting, comment skipping, persistence across reload

## Outstanding Risks

- Pre-existing clippy warnings (19 from code outside this change) cause cargo clippy -- -D warnings to fail; these are not introduced by this change
- One flaky integration test (checkpoint_test::worktree_adapter_creates_finds_and_resets_checkpoint_commits) occasionally fails due to git timing; unrelated to this change
